pr.title: Record: LeakyReLU(0.9)² + N-gram Cache + Entropy-Reg QAT — val_bpb 0.9958 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines LeakyReLU(0.9)² base, score-first TTT, backward-looking n-gram eval cache, and entropy-regularized mixed int5/int6 quantization for FineWeb.
techniques: - LeakyReLU(0.9)² MLP layered on the Parallel Muon base with score-first TTT.
- Backward-looking 7-gram eval cache blended during inference for repetitively structured validation.
- Entropy-regularized QAT plus mixed int5/int6 quantization with GPTQ-lite per-row clipping.
